blockers.description: gsd-sdk v0.1.0 installed locally does not implement the `query` subcommand the workflow expects (init.execute-phase, phase-plan-index, state.begin-phase, roadmap.update-plan-progress, etc.)
blockers.workaround: Execute the workflow logic with plain bash + markdown edits. Each subagent prompt is hand-built. Tracking file updates (STATE.md, ROADMAP.md) are done with Edit tool against current state.

decisions.decision: Each plan in phase 63 is in its own wave (Wave 1 = Plan 01, Wave 2 = Plan 02, Wave 3 = Plan 03) with strict linear dependencies — execute sequentially, no parallelism
decisions.rationale: Per 63-01-PLAN.md frontmatter wave:1, 63-02-PLAN.md frontmatter wave:2 depends_on:['01'], 63-03-PLAN.md frontmatter wave:3 depends_on:['01','02']

decisions.decision: Spawn one gsd-executor subagent per plan (not per task) — let the executor handle the 2-3 tasks inside each plan with its own atomic commit discipline
decisions.rationale: Standard execute-phase pattern; matches plan granularity in 63-01/02/03-PLAN.md frontmatter (autonomous: true)

decisions.decision: Do NOT run `npm run build` between Plan 01 and Plan 02
decisions.rationale: Plan 01 explicitly changes the return shape of reconcileEdgeLabels; edge-label-sync-service.ts will not compile until Plan 02 fixes the call sites — documented in 63-01-PLAN.md <verification> note 'Do NOT run npm run build at the end of this plan'

decisions.decision: Manually update STATE.md and ROADMAP.md after each plan completes (instead of via gsd-sdk)
decisions.rationale: Local gsd-sdk lacks `query state.begin-phase` and `query roadmap.update-plan-progress`. Use Edit tool against current STATE.md/ROADMAP.md content

next_action: Re-invoke `/gsd-execute-phase 63` (no flags). The orchestrator will load context fresh, detect zero plans completed, and re-spawn the gsd-executor for Plan 01 Wave 1. The full subagent prompt that was about to be dispatched is preserved in this handoff under context_notes — re-use it as-is or let the new orchestrator rebuild it from the workflow.
context_notes: Phase 63 is fully planned (research + patterns + 3 plans + validation in place since 2026-04-25 per STATE.md frontmatter). All gates passed. Execution was about to begin. The first subagent prompt was prepared and rejected by user — no changes were made. The intended subagent dispatch sequence is: (Wave 1) gsd-executor for 63-01-PLAN.md → 3 tasks (TDD: RED tests, GREEN impl, GREEN supplementary tests) → 4 commits (test, feat, test, docs+state) → (Wave 2) fresh gsd-executor for 63-02-PLAN.md → 2 tasks (RED tests, GREEN impl) → 3 commits → (Wave 3) fresh gsd-executor for 63-03-PLAN.md → 2 tasks → 3 commits → orchestrator runs full vitest + npm run build + spawns gsd-verifier for 63-VERIFICATION.md → presents human-verification UAT items (latency, in-flight protection, cold-open migration) → on approval, mark phase complete via Edit on STATE.md and ROADMAP.md. Critical CLAUDE.md rule for every executor: never delete or modify code in src/views/editor-panel-view.ts, src/canvas/edge-label-sync-service.ts, src/graph/edge-label-reconciler.ts, or the test files that wasn't authored in the current task — annotate every addition with `// Phase 63: ...`.
